calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Proof Of Transfer To San Mateo County
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Case Transferred

Petition To Invalidate Trust Restatement And For Construction
Off Calendar Jan-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Herlihy appeared via zoom for Llyod Kelly and Marlina Kelly (petitioner).
Anne LeClair appeared via zoom for Luda Kelly (trustee).

Discussion held regarding proper venue, that original counsel filed in San Francisco because his office was in San Francisco, that the case should be dismissed and filed in San Mateo County where the real property is located, and that the trust and main assets are in San Mateo County. Ms. LeClair stated that she will file a response to the petition. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
